===Pokémon Evolutions===
[[File:Cyrus Evolutions.png|thumb|250px|Cyrus in [[Pokémon Evolutions]]]]
Cyrus briefly appeared in a flashback in ''[[PE05|The Rival]]'', having summoned {{p|Dialga}} at the [[Spear Pillar]] alongside [[Mars]] and [[Jupiter]]. He watched as his {{tc|Commander}}s battled {{ga|Lucas}} and {{ga|Barry}}.
